caption: The video features three individuals seated on wooden chairs on a stage, engaged in a discussion. The person on the right, dressed in a gray suit and light blue shirt, is actively speaking and gesturing with their hands, indicating they are explaining or emphasizing a point. The individual on the left, wearing a white shirt and dark pants, is attentively listening, with their hands clasped together. The person in the middle, dressed in a black t-shirt and dark pants, is also listening intently, with their hands resting on their lap. The background includes purple lighting effects and some technical equipment, suggesting a formal event or panel discussion. A small table with a detailed model is placed in front of them, possibly related to the topic of their conversation.
